description_long: This is a dual-head industrial floodlight mounted on a sturdy, adjustable tripod stand. The lamp features two rectangular lighting units, each containing multiple horizontal fluorescent tubes encased in protective housings. The central support pole is reinforced and height-adjustable, with a robust base that provides stability on various surfaces. The lamp heads are positioned side by side and can likely be angled or rotated for directional lighting. The overall construction is predominantly metal, with some plastic or glass components for the light covers. The design is utilitarian, prioritizing function and durability for outdoor or worksite illumination.
description: A dual-head industrial floodlight on a height-adjustable tripod stand, featuring two rectangular lamp units with fluorescent tubes and a sturdy metal base.
description_view_0: Front view showing both rectangular lamp heads with visible fluorescent tubes and the central support pole.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the slim profile of the lamp heads and the depth of the protective housings.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backs of the lamp heads and the structure of the support pole and base.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again highlighting the narrow profile and the mounting hardware.
